articles.title: The Vivo X300 Ultra is going global. Here's why rivals should be worried
articles.summary: Vivo's new X300 Ultra flagship ships worldwide, featuring Zeiss optics, a periscope mega‑zoom lens and a suite of AI‑enhanced camera modes, positioning it as a serious competitor to Samsung and Apple in the premium smartphone market.
articles.final_title: Vivo X300 Ultra Launches Worldwide, Rivals Brace for Impact
articles.final_summary: Vivo is unleashing its X300 Ultra flagship - featuring Zeiss optics and a mega-zoom lens - across the globe, signaling a bold push into the premium smartphone arena and putting pressure on rivals to step up.

critic_feedback.feedback: The original title is a bit wordy and the summary could be punchier for an Instagram Story. Streamlining the language makes it more eye‑catching and concise.
critic_feedback.improved_title: Vivo X300 Ultra Launches Worldwide, Rivals Brace for Impact
critic_feedback.improved_summary: Vivo is unleashing its X300 Ultra flagship - featuring Zeiss optics and a mega-zoom lens - across the globe, signaling a bold push into the premium smartphone arena and putting pressure on rivals to step up.

articles.title: Smart, Durable, and Eco-Friendly: 5 Top-Rated Godrej Automatic Washers for Every Home
articles.summary: Godrej's latest automatic washing machines combine fuzzy‑logic load sensing, high‑efficiency motors and smart connectivity to cut water and electricity use, reflecting a growing consumer demand for eco‑friendly home appliances.
articles.final_title: 5 Must‑Have Godrej Washers: Smart, Tough & Eco‑Friendly
articles.final_summary: Godrej’s new washers use fuzzy‑logic sensors, high‑efficiency motors and Wi‑Fi connectivity to slash water and power use, delivering greener cleaning for every home.

critic_feedback.feedback: The title is a bit wordy and could be snappier for Instagram; the summary is too technical and long, so it needs a clearer, benefit‑focused rewrite.
critic_feedback.improved_title: 5 Must‑Have Godrej Washers: Smart, Tough & Eco‑Friendly
critic_feedback.improved_summary: Godrej’s new washers use fuzzy‑logic sensors, high‑efficiency motors and Wi‑Fi connectivity to slash water and power use, delivering greener cleaning for every home.
